login.title: Welcome
login.subtitle: Sign in with your Google account to see your events.

empty.title: No events found
empty.description: No events found for this email address.

registration.subtitle: Event registration
registration.submitError: Something went wrong. Please try again.

googleSignIn.title: Sign in with your Google account to register
googleSignIn.description: Your name and email will be filled in automatically.

registration.rsvpNotice: By confirming, your RSVP will be registered as confirmed.
registration.pendingNotice: This event requires you to complete checklist items. Your registration will remain pending until you do.

sections.locationHint: We use this to help plan logistics for the event.
sections.preferencesHint: These fields were configured by the event organizer.

checklist.title: What to complete before the event
checklist.subtitle: After confirming, you will need to complete these tasks.

success.title: RSVP confirmed!
success.message: Thank you, {{name}}! Your attendance has been successfully registered.
success.hint: You will receive a confirmation email shortly.

eventView.noEmail: Please register via the invite link to access your event details.

rsvpBanner.title: Registration confirmed!
rsvpBanner.subtitle: Your attendance has been registered. See your details below.

pendingBanner.title: Registration pending
pendingBanner.subtitle: Complete the required checklist items to confirm your attendance.

checklist.title: Your checklist
checklist.subtitle: Tasks and documents you need to complete before the event.
checklist.empty: No checklist items for this event.

contacts.title: Contact persons
contacts.empty: No contacts available for this event.

deleteDialog.title: Delete registration
deleteDialog.description: This will permanently remove your registration from this event. This action cannot be undone.
